name: invoice-iob
description: Create EN 16931 e-invoices (XRechnung/UBL/CII XML; visual PDF & ZUGFeRD/Factur-X coming) from simple fields — fully local, no data leaves your machine.
long_description: invoice-iob turns simple invoice details into compliant e-invoices for the German/EU market. It generates XRechnung 3.0 (UBL & CII), generic EN 16931 UBL/CII, and — in upcoming versions — a human-readable PDF and a ZUGFeRD/Factur-X hybrid PDF/A-3. Everything runs locally on your machine; no invoice data is ever transmitted. New countries and formats are added as plugins against a stable FormatProvider interface.

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description: Create an EN 16931 e-invoice (XML now; PDF and ZUGFeRD/Factur-X in later versions) and save it to the output folder.

tools.name: list_formats
tools.description: List the e-invoice formats available in this build.

output_directory.title: Output folder
output_directory.description: Folder where generated invoice files are written.
